Episteme 1.0.0-SNAPSHOT
  1. org.episteme.social.psychology

Uses of Package
org.episteme.social.psychology

Packages that use org.episteme.social.psychology
Package
Description
org.episteme.social.psychology
Provides the org.episteme.social.psychology module.
org.episteme.social.sociology
- social structures, persons, and cultural modeling.
  • Classes in org.episteme.social.psychology used by org.episteme.social.psychology
    Class
    Description
    Activity
    Represents a structured activity composed of nested sub-activities or atomic behaviors.
    Behavior
    Represents a specific behavior that an individual can exhibit.
    BigFiveProfile.OCEAN
    Represents a personality profile using the Five Factor Model.
    CognitiveLoadModel.CognitiveState
    Represents the resulting cognitive state of an individual performing a task.
    CognitiveLoadModel.LoadFactor
    Represents the components of cognitive load involved in a task.
    PsychologyConstants.BigFiveTrait
    The Big Five personality traits (Five Factor Model).
    PsychologyConstants.Emotion
    Primary and secondary emotions.
    PsychologyConstants.NeedLevel
    Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs.
    PsychologyConstants.PersonalityDimension
    Myers-Briggs/Keirsey personality dimensions.
    PsychologyConstants.SleepStage
    Stages of sleep.
  • Classes in org.episteme.social.psychology used by org.episteme.social.sociology
    Class
    Description
    BigFiveProfile
    Models the Big Five personality traits (OCEAN model).
